title: What is AI & How Can It Help You?
goal: Understand what AI is in plain language and how it can make everyday life easier.
steps: AI means 'artificial intelligence' — a tool that can understand and answer questions, write, and help with tasks.
Think of it as a helpful assistant that’s always available.
You can talk to it by typing or speaking, just like you would to a person.
AI can help with reminders, writing letters, finding recipes, and more.
You stay in control — it only does what you ask it to.
practicePrompt: Write a short ‘thinking of you’ note to my friend Mary.
safetyTip: Never give AI your Social Security number, bank account info, or passwords.

title: Making Video Calls
goal: Learn how to connect with friends and family through live video.
steps: Make sure your device has a camera and microphone.
Install or open a video call app (e.g., FaceTime, Zoom, WhatsApp).
Add the person’s name or phone/email to your contact list.
Click their name, then click the camera icon to start the call.
Speak clearly and enjoy seeing them!
safetyTip: Only accept video calls from people you know and trust.

title: Writing Letters & Cards with AI
goal: Use AI to help write warm, personal messages.
steps: Open your AI chat app.
Tell it who the message is for and what you want to say.
Ask it to make the message friendly and personal.
Copy or write down the text AI gives you.
Add it to your letter, card, or email.
practicePrompt: Write a friendly holiday card for my neighbor named Susan, thanking her for the cookies she baked.
safetyTip: Never share your home address in online messages unless you know the person personally.

title: Organizing & Sharing Photos
goal: Keep your favorite pictures easy to find and share.
steps: Open your photo gallery or app.
Create folders or albums for events (e.g., 'Family,' 'Vacations').
Add names or short notes to each photo.
Use 'Share' to send a photo to a friend or family member.
Ask AI for tips on labeling or organizing your albums.
practicePrompt: Help me name and organize my trip photos into albums.
safetyTip: Avoid posting photos that show your address, license plates, or personal documents.

title: Setting Reminders & Calendar Events
goal: Never forget important dates or tasks.
steps: Open your phone’s reminder or calendar app.
Tap 'Add' or '+' to create a new reminder/event.
Type the task or event name.
Choose a date and time to be alerted.
Save it, and your device will remind you.
practicePrompt: Set a reminder for my doctor’s appointment next Thursday at 3 PM.
safetyTip: Do not post your full schedule online for everyone to see.

title: Spotting Scams & Staying Safe Online
goal: Recognize and avoid online and phone scams.
steps: Be cautious of messages from unknown people.
Scammers often create urgency ('Act now!') to trick you.
Do not click links from unknown senders.
AI can help check if a message looks suspicious.
When in doubt, delete the message or call someone you trust.
practicePrompt: Check if this email about winning a prize might be a scam.
safetyTip: No legitimate company will ever ask for passwords or bank info by email or text.

title: Fun with AI: Hobbies & Entertainment
goal: Use AI for enjoyment, hobbies, and mental stimulation.
steps: Think of a hobby or interest you enjoy.
Ask AI to suggest ideas, activities, or tips.
Try AI-generated recipes, trivia questions, or gardening advice.
Use it to create short stories or poems.
Keep experimenting for fun!
practicePrompt: Give me 5 easy crossword clues about Florida beaches.
safetyTip: Double-check any advice that involves your health, finances, or legal matters with a real professional.
